headline: Trump 🍊🚀 MOONs China 🇨🇳 with Artemis Gold Rush 💰🌕‼️
text:
Trump Daddy 🍊👨‍💼 spotting that AMERICA FIRST 🦅🇺🇸 JACKPOT 💰 on NASA's Artemis II MOON MISSION 🌕🚀 – first deep space joyride since '72 📈😤, SLAYING China's lunar simp vibes 🇨🇳🐸! Four astro-baddies 👨‍🚀👩‍🚀 blasting off WEDNESDAY 📅💥 to GO FURTHER THAN EVER BEFORE 🪐🔥, stepping stone to PERMANENT MOON BASE 🏠🌕 and Mars daddy dreams 🛸🍆 by 2028-2030! Trump cooked this up in Term 1 🔥 with Space Force 💪🛡️, now EXEC ORDER 📜 dropping BOMBS 💣: US owns the high ground 🚫🇨🇳, no more FLAGS & FOOTPRINTS 🦶👣 – WE STAY 👑🌕 forever bby!

NASA boss Jared Isaacman 🧑‍🚀💼 spilling TEA ☕: 'Geopolitical RIVAL China 🇨🇳 challenging our SPACE THRONE 👑🪐!' Cold War flashbacks ❄️🚀 vs Soviets Sputnik shockwaves 😱📡, JFK whispering 'It's a RACE 🏁💨' – now US vs China MOON RACE 2.0 🥊🌕 for LUNAR GOLD RUSH 💰🍑! Helium-3 fusion FUEL 🚀⚡ at $20K/kg 🤑💎, water ice 🚀💦 for rockets, lithium/platinum RARE EARTHS 🪙🔋 stealing China's mining monopoly 😤🇨🇳 – Trump admin SALTY AF 🧂 about that trade beef 🥩!

Ex-NASA Sean O'Keefe 🧓📈 hyping: Moon ain't dust bowl 🛸😩, it's a TREASURE CHEST 💰🌕 with fusion reactors BRRRR 😩💨 and clean tech JACKPOT! CIA vet Clayton Swope 🕵️‍♂️ comparing to Lewis & Clark WILD WEST EXPLORE 🐎🏜️ – 'We don't know the price tag yet 💸🤔, but China rivalry got us THIRSTY 😩💦!' White House Liz Huston 👩‍💼📢: 'Trump's America First LEADS HUMANITY 🚀👫 into SPACE ORGY 💥🪐!'

Gen X boomers 🧓📺 grew up on Neil Armstrong's 'ONE SMALL STEP' 🦶🌕 epic in '69 amid Vietnam hell 🔥😢, MLK/RFK assas vibes 💔, Nixon drama 🦹‍♂️ – yet 150M AMERICANS TUNED IN 📺🇺🇸 for NATIONAL PRIDE HIGH 🦅😍! Artemis II could UNITE divided USA 🇺🇸🔄 like Apollo 11 magic ✨, even with Iran strikes 💣🇮🇷, immig/econ wars 😡💸 – space is the ULTIMATE Bipartisan BANGER 🎉🚀 says CFR Esther Brimmer 🧠🌌!

Astro prof David Gerdes 👨‍🏫⭐ reminiscing kiddo blanket naps 🛌📺 watching Cronkite on B&W TV 🖥️⚫️: 'Bold astronauts INSPIRED ALL AGES 😍🧒, transcended partisan BS 🤝!' Diverse crew 2026 🌕👨‍🚀👩‍🚀👥 gonna HEAL THE DIVIDE 🫂🇺🇸, Trump MOONING critics 🍑🌕 while Space Force GUARDS the lunar loot 🛡️💰 – CHINA BTFO 🇨🇳😭, AMERICA WINS THE COSMOS CROWN 👑🪐‼️
